query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: Fetch parcels larger than 5000 m² in Drammen

4.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones in Drammen

5.description: Find nearest quick-clay hazard zone for each parcel

6.description: Sort by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone
